title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 13–16, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Luffy’s crew moves closer to Nami’s truth while Arlong’s crew treats the island as their possession.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: We're here! This is Cocoyashi Village!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't mention it! Take care! And come visit again!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So that saw-nose is in this town too, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, whatever... I'll look for our long-nose first.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Did he come for my head!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: that guy with the Harmaki we caught earlier... was Zoro...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I finally caught him! I could've killed him,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But I thought you'd feel a lot better if you killed him yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: that Pipsqueak ain't nearly enough to satisfy my rage right now...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: R-right!? Then w-why don't you... just let me go, huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That Uhh... thing I did earlier was just my way of saying hello! Everyone in my hometown says hello that way!

dialogue.speaker: Chew
dialogue.text: CHU!:) Wait a minute... what happened here!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But how did he escape...? Have you considered this line of thought, Arlong?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Maybe Nami purposely brought him here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So he could try to take your head...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now that you mention it, she was acting pretty funny today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: yeah, she did dive into the water to save him...!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
